channel.title: DDOS attack on THIS IS SLY
channel.description: Recent content in DDOS attack on THIS IS SLY

item.title: Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) Flooding Attacks
item.description: section —categorization of different DDoS flooding attacks based on the protocol level 1）Network/transport-level DDoS flooding attacks ·disrupting legitimate user’s connectivity by exhausting victim network’
